title: Redstone Lamp Toggle
description: A redstone lamp lit by a lever — the simplest controllable light. The lamp turns on the instant it receives any power (signal strength 1-15) and turns off when power is removed.

steps.title: Place the lamp
steps.explanation: Set down a redstone lamp. On its own it stays dark — it needs a power source touching it.

steps.title: Add a lever
steps.explanation: Put a block beside the lamp and a lever on top. A lever next to (or on) the lamp powers it directly — no dust needed. Flip it and the lamp lights up.
